creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
Created attachment 164354
audio/streamtuner/Makefile diff

Unless I am missing something, it appears this port no longer works. It appears Shoutcast has changed their API and this port is no longer able to fetch the list.

This is not surprising as this has been unmaintained for about a decade, 0.99.99 coming out in like either 2004 or 2005.
